---
title: "\'Anatomy of a Friendship: E. A. Freeman and Edith Thompson\'"
---

## \'Anatomy of a Friendship: E. A. Freeman and Edith Thompson\'

**Author:** Amanda Capern
**Date:** 1997
**Imprint:** <i>Paragon Review</i> at www.hull.ac.uk/oldlib/archives/paragon/1997/anatomy.html

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
